reportedIssues: The sticky bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game row, cutting off the bottoms of the tiles and hiding part of the content.
One game tile displays a negative amount, "-$6,266.13", which looks like broken or incorrectly formatted data for a casino jackpot/value label.
Several cards and labels are partially clipped on the right side of the screen, leaving the last item in each row only partly visible.

expected.reasoning: Reported issue 1 describes a game tile displaying a negative jackpot value (-$6,266.13), which directly matches the expected defect of a negative jackpot value.
